name: Rio Grande do Norte (Brazil)

colors.symbolism: Rio Grande do Norte's mineral wealth

description: Three horizontal stripes, a narrow green at the top, a wide white centre and a narrow yellow at the bottom, with the state coat of arms in the centre of the white band.
history: Adopted on 3 December 1957 by State Law No. 1.952; the design closely follows the visual conventions of other Brazilian state flags of the period.

features.symbolism: Three horizontal bands of green, white and yellow, with the state coat of arms centred on the wide white band
the coat of arms of Rio Grande do Norte, featuring a star, a globe and references to the salt and cotton industries
